title: Moroccan Cheese Frittata
description: A flavorful and satisfying frittata filled with the rich flavors of moroccan spices, crispy cheese, and charred vegetables.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the diced onions and bell peppers until tender.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and moroccan spice blend.
Add the shredded cheese to the bowl and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the cooked vegetables in the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the frittata is set.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata out of the skillet onto a plate and serve hot.
Slice into wedges and serve immediately.
